thesis_one_liner: Global alternative-asset platform compounding fee-bearing capital and distributable earnings (DE) with insurance/wealth scale; holdco complexity masks steady FRE growth.
base_irr_label: Lawrence consolidated base (stance gate); total synthesis 12.71%
key_assumptions: LTM DE $2.54/sh per Q1-26 supplemental (owner earnings proxy)
60/40 split: direct+operating DE vs FRE/wealth DE for non-overlapping component proofs
Base growth 8% years 1-5, 6% years 6-7; exit 16× year-10 cash flow
open_questions: Parent-only corporate net cash/debt carve-out from consolidated 40-F
BN+BNT simplification timing and DE per share accretion
Full-tier 40-F extract for segment DE bridge
